rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) has no relation to §11.253, which governs tangible personal property in transit. The two provisions address entirely separate exemption categories.
quote: A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of the appraised value of that portion of the person's property that consists of goods-in-transit.
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the goods-in-transit exemption provisions of §11.253.
